_comment: Ophis agent-wallet policy pack for Privy (server wallets / session signers). Parameterized template: substitute the {{PLACEHOLDER}} values from ../addresses.json for your target chain, then attach the policy to the agent's wallet. Privy evaluates rules default-DENY: any method with no matching ALLOW rule is denied, and any matching DENY overrides an ALLOW. Do NOT add a catch-all { method: '*', action: 'DENY' } rule; it would evaluate on every call and override the ALLOW rules below. The implicit default already denies everything not explicitly allowed (exportPrivateKey, personal_sign, arbitrary contract calls, etc.). Schema: https://docs.privy.io/controls/policies/overview
_replace_ORDER_TYPES_REF: This file is NOT valid until you replace the QUOTED token "{{ORDER_TYPES_REF}}" (delete the surrounding double-quotes too) with the RAW EIP-712 Order type ARRAY below, at every occurrence. Privy's typed_data.types.Order must be a JSON array of field definitions, NOT a string, so after substitution the value must read `"Order": [ {"name":"sellToken",...}, ... ]` with no quotes around the array. Paste this exact array (it is the CoW GPv2Order struct, identical across chains): [ {"name":"sellToken","type":"address"}, {"name":"buyToken","type":"address"}, {"name":"receiver","type":"address"}, {"name":"sellAmount","type":"uint256"}, {"name":"buyAmount","type":"uint256"}, {"name":"validTo","type":"uint32"}, {"name":"appData","type":"bytes32"}, {"name":"feeAmount","type":"uint256"}, {"name":"kind","type":"string"}, {"name":"partiallyFillable","type":"bool"}, {"name":"sellTokenBalance","type":"string"}, {"name":"buyTokenBalance","type":"string"} ].
name: Ophis-only agent wallet ({{CHAIN_NAME}})

rules.name: Allow the one-time sell-token approval, spender pinned to the Ophis vault relayer

conditions._comment: OPTIONAL bounded allowance. Delete this condition to permit an unlimited approve. {{MAX_APPROVE_AMOUNT}} is a uint256 hex string (e.g. 1000 USDC at 6 decimals = 0x3B9ACA00).

rules.name: Allow signing Ophis orders only: correct domain, receiver pinned to self, tokens on the allowlist

conditions._comment: Domain chainId is camelCase here (mirrors EIP-712), unlike chain_id on the transaction source.

The Ophis settlement contract for this chain. On the 10 non-sovereign chains this equals the canonical GPv2 address, which is shared with CoW Swap; only Optimism and Unichain carry an Ophis-exclusive verifyingContract.
Anti-exfiltration pin: proceeds can only be delivered to the agent's own account.

rules.name: Never export the raw key material
